title: Pencils Canonical Representation
description: Rectangle grid where some cells contain number clues (positive integers) or pencil head icons (negative integers indicating direction). Players draw pencil bodies, heads, and trail lines to fill the grid.

cells.description: m x n grid of integers. 0 = empty, positive integers = number clue, -1 = head-up, -2 = head-down, -3 = head-left, -4 = head-right.
